<main>


<div class="container bgc_23 fc_fff">
	<div class="container_in">
		<ul id="breadcrumbs" itemscope itemtype="http://schema.org/BreadcrumbList"><li itemprop="itemListElement" itemscope itemtype="http://schema.org/ListItem"><a class="home" href="https://www.e-iizuka.co.jp" itemprop="url"><span itemprop="title">ホーム</span></a><meta itemprop="position" content="1" /></li><li itemprop='itemListElement' itemscope itemtype='http://schema.org/ListItem'><span itemprop='title'>お問い合わせ</span><meta itemprop='position' content='2' /></li></ul>	</div>

  <div id="post-97" class="post-97 page type-page status-publish hentry">
	<article class="article">
		<div class="contents_w" id="contents_w">
						<div class="page_w contact_w">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="container_in box_us">
<p class="ta_center_left">お問い合わせは下記のメールフォームにて<br class="sp_disp">お問い合わせください。</p>
      <div id="mw_wp_form_mw-wp-form-105" class="mw_wp_form mw_wp_form_input  ">
					<script charset="UTF-8" src="https://zipaddr.github.io/zipaddrx.js?v=1.42"></script><script defer src="data:text/javascript;base64,ZnVuY3Rpb24gemlwYWRkcl9vd25iKCl7WlAuZGxpPSctJztaUC53cD0nMSc7WlAudXZlcj0nNDkxMDAuMjI3MTYnO1pQLnN5c2lkPSdNV1dQRm9ybSc7fQ=="></script><script charset="UTF-8" src="https://zipaddr.github.io/mwwpform.js"></script><form method="post" action="" enctype="multipart/form-data"><table>
	<tr>
		<th>お名前 <br class="disp600sp" /><span>※必須</span></th>
		<td>
<input type="text" name="name" class="form_01" size="60" value="" />
</td>
	</tr>
	<tr>
		<th>ふりがな <br class="disp600sp" /><span>※必須</span></th>
		<td>
<input type="text" name="kana" class="form_01" size="60" value="" />
</td>
	</tr>
	<tr>
		<th>会社名</th>
		<td>
<input type="text" name="company" class="form_01" size="60" value="" />
</td>
	</tr>
	<tr>
		<th>部署名</th>
		<td>
<input type="text" name="department" class="form_01" size="60" value="" />
</td>
	</tr>
	<tr>
		<th>住所 <br class="disp600sp" /><span>※必須</span></th>
		<td>
			〒
<input type="text" name="zip" id="zip" class="form_03" size="60" value="" />
－
<input type="text" name="zip1" id="zip1" class="form_03" size="60" value="" />
<br />
			
<input type="text" name="addr" id="addr" class="form_01 mt20" size="60" value="" />

		</td>
	</tr>
	<tr>
		<th>電話番号</th>
		<td>
<input type="text" name="tel" class="form_01" size="60" value="" />
<br /><span class="kome">※"-"なしで入力ください　(例. 0251231234)</span></td>
	</tr>
	<tr>
		<th>メールアドレス <br class="disp600sp" /><span>※必須</span></th>
		<td>
<input type="email" name="email" class="form_01" size="60" value="" data-conv-half-alphanumeric="true"/>
</td>
	</tr>
	<tr>
		<th>お問い合わせ種別 <br class="disp600sp" /><span>※必須</span></th>
		<td>	<span class="mwform-radio-field vertical-item">
		<label >
			<input type="radio" name="shubetsu" value="加工・製作に関するお問い合わせ" class="form_01" />
			<span class="mwform-radio-field-text">加工・製作に関するお問い合わせ</span>
		</label>
	</span>
	<span class="mwform-radio-field vertical-item">
		<label >
			<input type="radio" name="shubetsu" value="弊社への営業のお問い合わせ" class="form_01" />
			<span class="mwform-radio-field-text">弊社への営業のお問い合わせ</span>
		</label>
	</span>
	<span class="mwform-radio-field vertical-item">
		<label >
			<input type="radio" name="shubetsu" value="その他" class="form_01" />
			<span class="mwform-radio-field-text">その他</span>
		</label>
	</span>

<input type="hidden" name="__children[shubetsu][]" value="{"\u52a0\u5de5\u30fb\u88fd\u4f5c\u306b\u95a2\u3059\u308b\u304a\u554f\u3044\u5408\u308f\u305b":"\u52a0\u5de5\u30fb\u88fd\u4f5c\u306b\u95a2\u3059\u308b\u304a\u554f\u3044\u5408\u308f\u305b","\u5f0a\u793e\u3078\u306e\u55b6\u696d\u306e\u304a\u554f\u3044\u5408\u308f\u305b":"\u5f0a\u793e\u3078\u306e\u55b6\u696d\u306e\u304a\u554f\u3044\u5408\u308f\u305b","\u305d\u306e\u4ed6":"\u305d\u306e\u4ed6"}" />
</td>
	</tr>
	<tr>
		<th>お問い合わせ内容 <br class="disp600sp" /><span>※必須</span></th>
		<td>
<textarea name="detail" class="form_02" cols="40" rows="5" ></textarea>
</td>
	</tr>
</table>

</div>
